name: Vanta.js Waves — Animated Hero Background
description: WebGL animated wave background on the hero section. Mouse-interactive. Reads the site's CSS --primary colour variable automatically.
body:
<script src="https://cdnjs.cloudflare.com/ajax/libs/three.js/r134/three.min.js"></script>
<script src="https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/vanta@0.5.24/dist/vanta.waves.min.js"></script>
<script>
  document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', function () {
    var hero = document.querySelector('#hero, .hero, [data-vanta-hero]');
    if (!hero) return;
    var primary = getComputedStyle(document.documentElement)
      .getPropertyValue('--primary').trim() || '#5b4dff';
    var colorInt = parseInt(primary.replace('#', ''), 16);
    VANTA.WAVES({
      el: hero,
      color: colorInt,
      waveHeight: 18,
      shininess: 40,
      waveSpeed: 0.9,
      zoom: 0.8,
      mouseControls: true,
      touchControls: true
    });
  });
</script>
